creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the submission.  Point taken, and except of installing the 
ckermit.ini into the etc directory and run it by default, i've basically 
implemented it this way, modulo required changes for Kermit version 7. 

Frank da Cruz affirmed me that as of version 7, the defaults should be 
viable for most users, so there's no need for always running ckermit.ini.
